name: support_triage_router
problem: Build a customer support system that triages incoming tickets, looks up account data, and escalates billing disputes to a specialist.

agents.name: triage_router
agents.role: Classify incoming support tickets and route them to the right specialist

agents.name: account_lookup
agents.role: Look up customer account records and recent activity

agents.name: billing_specialist
agents.role: Resolve billing disputes and issue adjustments
